chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-2341 of 2021 Date Order with signature of Judge PRIORITY 1. For orders on Office Objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.10053/2021. 3. For hearing of main case. 07.09.2021. Mr. Ghulam Shabbir Baber, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Khaleeque Ahmed, DAG. ----- Mr. Saad Abbasi, Law Officer SECP files comments on behalf of Respondents No.4 and 5, which are taken on record copy whereof has already been supplied to the learned counsel for the Petitioner. Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petitioner wants to withdraw the instant Petition and approach the Islamabad High Court where some Petitions of similar nature are pending for redressal of its grievance. The instant Petition is dismissed as withdrawn alongwith listed application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE MUBASHIR
